The '''lerraa''' was a large reptilian quadruped indigenous to the swamps of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. It had a long neck, a large nasal horn, and padded feet which, when planted firmly on the ground, made it nearly immovable. Because of this trait, and because of its motionless stance, aided by its large tail as a counterbalance, the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] military found it useful as a mobile mount for a cannon. Properly domesticated and trained, the lerraa would stand firm in the face of incoming blaster fire, while its large cannons targeted enemy vehicles, such as [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tanks]] or [[Multi-Troop Transport/Legends|Multi-Troop Transports]], with high-yield [[Booma/Legends|boomas]]. Lerraas were very similar in appearance to [[Zalaaca/Legends|zalaacas]], another species domesticated by the Gungans.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
